rationale: In the citing paper, Schweidel and Moe (2014) appears only in a grouped literature citation within the marketing UGC review, as an example of prior work assessing outcomes of content sharing without focusing on specific topics. The citing authors do not discuss this paper's joint sentiment-venue model, borrow its method, or build hypotheses directly from it. It is used as broad background positioning rather than as a distinct conceptual or methodological input to the study.
